summary: Entry and exit seams are clean — POV handoffs, temporal relationships, and narrative momentum between Ch01/Ch02/Ch03 require no structural adjustment. Opening-construction diversity passes (sensory transit platform vs. Ch03's anxious suit-selection). No style bible example lines found verbatim. Single prose-tic fix applied: 'the quality of' appeared three times (lines 45, 51, 133), exceeding the constitution's two-per-chapter threshold; changed one instance to 'the certainty of' in the handshake passage.
edits: Line 51: changed 'had the quality of a man' to 'had the certainty of a man' to eliminate a three-instance prose tic ('the quality of [noun]') per constitution rule 9
